channel.title: Personal on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Have an average day :|

item.title: Blog Import!
item.description: I imported my blog! well mosst of it anyway. I’ve been dragging this thing along with me since the days of blogger! It’s been blogger, wordpress, ghost, and now hugo. I’m sure a lot of the formatting is messed up, images won’t show up, and links are all kinds of wrong. However it’s my mess and maybe one day I’ll get around to fixing it. Until then, it’s my blog in all it’s shame.

item.title: Republican Chokes Up At Gay Marriage Debate In Washington - YouTube
item.description: She nailed it. Republican Chokes Up At Gay Marriage Debate In Washington – YouTube.
